# zabbix_report (Resource)





<!-- schema generated by tfplugindocs -->
## Schema

### Required

- `cycle` (Number) Scheduling cycle. 0=daily, 1=weekly, 2=monthly, 3=yearly.
- `dashboardid` (String) Dashboard ID used for report content.
- `name` (String) Name of the report.
- `period` (Number) Reporting period. 0=previous day, 1=previous week, 2=previous month, 3=previous year.
- `userid` (String) Owner user ID of the report.

### Optional

- `active_since` (String) Active since timestamp string accepted by Zabbix.
- `active_till` (String) Active till timestamp string accepted by Zabbix.
- `description` (String) Description of the report.
- `message` (String) Email message body.
- `start_time` (Number) Report start time value accepted by Zabbix API.
- `status` (Number) Report status. 0=disabled, 1=enabled.
- `subject` (String) Email subject.
- `user` (Block List) User recipients. (see [below for nested schema](#nestedblock--user))
- `user_group` (Block List) User group recipients. (see [below for nested schema](#nestedblock--user_group))
- `weekdays` (Number) Bitmask for weekdays (Mon=1, Tue=2, Wed=4, Thu=8, Fri=16, Sat=32, Sun=64).

### Read-Only

- `id` (String) The ID of this resource.
- `info` (String) Information about report delivery state (read-only).
- `lastsent` (Number) Unix timestamp of last successful send (read-only).
- `state` (Number) Current delivery state (read-only).

<a id="nestedblock--user"></a>
### Nested Schema for `user`

Required:

- `userid` (String)

Optional:

- `access_userid` (String)
- `exclude` (Number)


<a id="nestedblock--user_group"></a>
### Nested Schema for `user_group`

Required:

- `usrgrpid` (String)

Optional:

- `access_userid` (String)
